CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Discord Integration
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Create a notification message for Discord when browsing the kingdom gauntlet.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Kingdom Gauntlet Overlay
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Show a list of players with unfinished kingdom gauntlet floors.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Dungeon / Wayvessel Session Overlay
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Shows statistics of earned orns and gold when in a dungeon or at a wayvessel.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Invites Overlay
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Show a notification overlay with current party invites and cooldowns.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Item Assess Overlay
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Automatically assess items when opened in the inventory view.

Preference.android:title: Enable Notification Service
Preference.android:summary: Tap to enable notifications for this app.

Preference.android:title: Enable Accessibility Service
Preference.android:summary: Required for overlay features to function properly.

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Enable Overlay Permission
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Allow this app to draw overlays over other apps.

Preference.android:title: Check for Updates
Preference.android:summary: Check if a new version of Orna Assistant is available.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Enable Debug Logging
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Show extra debug messages in Logcat
